{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032313584413E46336E679C150EB37"}"},"total":3250},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7204267532613321476","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看过最好的一本末世文 人物都写的很好，没有丧尸异能什么乱七八糟的，很符合，但是就是更新太慢了，不理解为什么评分那么低，十几年书虫了。感觉比那些高分的好看多了应该是被恶意刷低了……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1677374407,"group_id":"7196962342398069821","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"遇事不决.可问春风","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8iDBFJwALuvrQumYDvWRWfpJHbKviXuYBkQV6Bmv18G","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/171ce97653d14e5b9aa1a2d237641ce8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793193&x-signature=Jx69ZqcHpP%2F6lOY7MuXCfZTHIq8%3D","user_id":"1890772317648653","user_name":"可问春风·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1890772317648653","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196962342398069821","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间+复仇+冷血游戏人间）
天灾降临，地球的气温骤降，进入冰河纪元。
幸存者林枫在乱世中挣扎五年，最终被队友背叛，葬身兽群。
上天给了他重来的机会，让他带着自己的空间异能回到了天灾降临的半个月之前。
这一世，他对自己的未来有了新的规划。
他要好好活着，让每一个伤害过自己的人都付出代价。
那么，一切就先收集物资开始吧。
“看过动物世界吗？狼捕杀绵羊的时候，旁观者不能出手救助可怜的小羊，因为那会害死同为地球生灵的狼。我不会和羊共情，因为我也是狼。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0c063b20df99898576d64b6c598fd00c","author":"酒囊饭袋鱼老八","author_id":"","book_id":"7196962342398069821","book_name":"冰河末世，囤货无数坐看风云变幻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7196962560867107385","read_count":"41245","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4837675"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"2252","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,求生,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2d461ffb4563ba962103d63b5357648f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429524&x-signature=0wvBEadH74tws4xW6EuNGFOWOnY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103351739065","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5293554e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032313584413E46336E679C150EB37"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":40,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15293,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":123531},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1677386103,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7345409978936738622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"到现在为止在番茄上看到的最好的一本末世重生小说，没有之一。刚看开头还以为是又一本爽文，但往后读发现作者是在末世大环境下对各个人物的性格剖析；从主角林枫对各种事物的看法和决断，到其他人对主角的看法和各自对待末世的处理方式，每个人物的性格塑造比较饱满，文笔也很细腻，情节不算拖沓很稳，没啥乱挖坑的地方。强烈建议大家看看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710240822,"group_id":"7196962342398069821","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N92om0czJeVW4sfu5Uf+wLw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa0854e8bc8441aaae600453f1af89ee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791017&x-signature=ymvGfx8%2BFTzGX7gg%2FtQEWLujdL8%3D","user_id":"919642113845134","user_name":"弥初乀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"919642113845134","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774342124,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196962342398069821","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+重生+空间+复仇+冷血游戏人间）
天灾降临，地球的气温骤降，进入冰河纪元。
幸存者林枫在乱世中挣扎五年，最终被队友背叛，葬身兽群。

这一世，他对自己的未来有了新的规划。

那么，一切就先收集物资开始吧。
“看过动物世界吗？狼捕杀绵羊的时候，旁观者不能出手救助可怜的小羊，因为那会害死同为地球生灵的狼。我不会和羊共情，因为我也是狼。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0c063b20df99898576d64b6c598fd00c","author":"酒囊饭袋鱼老八","author_id":"","book_id":"7196962342398069821","book_name":"冰河末世，囤货无数坐看风云变幻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7196962560867107385","read_count":"41245","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4837675"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"2252","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,求生,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2d461ffb4563ba962103d63b5357648f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429524&x-signature=0wvBEadH74tws4xW6EuNGFOWOnY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103351739065","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"779"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032313584413E46336E679C150EB37"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读28小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":100583,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8848},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7225140113198007099","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有一说一，写的真的不错。真正体现了末世两个字的含义。太多末世小说一上来就是社会崩塌，人性泯灭，国家机器好像纸糊的一样，只要不是地球爆炸，任何灾难都有个过程，在和平年代生活久的人不可能一下子就抛弃人性。我觉得这本书的剧情挺合理的，循序渐进，秩序不是一天就能彻底崩溃的，这种从繁华盛世一步步走向末世，人性的转变，各种怪物和觉醒者的陆续登场，人类命运的未知，在这种席卷全球的灾难中，每个人都在为生存不择手段，或好或坏，人性的善与恶表现的淋漓尽致。","text_exts":[{"e":200,"s":196,"text":"不择手段","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E6%8B%A9%E6%89%8B%E6%AE%B5&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774245524C150EB37%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227225140113198007099%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227196962342398069821%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E6%8B%A9%E6%89%8B%E6%AE%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682234163,"group_id":"7196962342398069821","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Ga9dyPnRhI0Z0jyfGlsb+MWMNAhCKrOa9WuQbOHnNi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/159649f5667c47b2bca717dc0c2cb55e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793527&x-signature=zzuvHl%2Fxz9PiTE9HtTc4idb5agM%3D","user_id":"1442978942443188","user_name":"-io1"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1442978942443188","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":f
